gate_rule: accept iff d_in>=0 AND d_ho>=0 AND max(d_in,d_ho)>0

proposals.targeted_cluster: Repro test written by write_test role has incomplete coverage or misses critical edge cases; fix addresses only what repro test validates
Repro test has incomplete coverage; hidden tests fail despite local repro pass
proposals.expected_effect: write_test role now explicitly validates edge case coverage (≥3 boundary conditions per issue + tight assertions per case) before finalizing test. Forces test author to think systematically about incomplete coverage before it causes hidden test failures.
proposals.regression_risk: Low — adds stricter reasoning to write_test but does not change test structure or validation logic; the 23 held-in instances passed tests that already covered edge cases well, so this clarification should reinforce their patterns without breaking them.

proposals.targeted_cluster: Repro test written by write_test role has incomplete coverage or misses critical edge cases
proposals.expected_effect: Write_test role now explicitly tasked with COMPREHENSIVE coverage including edge cases and boundary conditions rather than minimal symptom-only tests. This should catch incomplete fixes that pass local repro but fail hidden test suite by validating related behaviors and edge cases the fix must handle.
proposals.regression_risk: LOW — change only adds explicit guidance to write more comprehensive tests; does not remove any existing validation logic. The 23 held-in instances should remain valid since they already required comprehensive testing to pass hidden tests.
